summary: Tested sidebar restructuring requirements. 2 out of 3 changes verified successfully. Admin section still contains extra items beyond 'مميزات البرنامج'.

ui_bugs.issue: الإدارة (Administration) section should contain ONLY 'مميزات البرنامج' but currently contains: /features, /api-keys, /settings, /settings/sidebar

passed_tests.details: /users link found in sidebar under إدارة الموظفين
/permissions link found in sidebar under إدارة الموظفين
Customers section only contains: الزبائن, عائلات الزبائن, ديون الزبائن
Users management page loads with 7 users displayed
Permissions management page loads correctly with user permissions table
Features page loads with feature toggles for all modules

failed_tests.details: Admin section contains 4 items: /features, /api-keys, /settings, /settings/sidebar. Expected only /features
failed_tests.fix_required: Remove /api-keys, /settings, /settings/sidebar from admin section in Layout.js lines 381-391

action_items: CRITICAL: Update Layout.js lines 385-391 - Remove api-keys, settings, and settings/sidebar from the 'admin' section. These should be moved elsewhere or removed per user requirements.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js line 385-391: Admin section incorrectly includes api-keys, settings, settings/sidebar. Per requirements, only 'مميزات البرنامج' (/features) should be in 'الإدارة' section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login working with super@ntcommerce.com/password. Sidebar restructuring partially complete. Users/Permissions moved to إدارة الموظفين correctly. العمال removed from الزبائن correctly. BUT الإدارة section still has extra items (api-keys, settings, sidebar settings) that need to be removed - should only contain مميزات البرنامج.

code_fix_required.current_code:
items: [
  { path: '/features', icon: LayoutDashboard, label: language === 'ar' ? 'مميزات البرنامج' : 'Fonctionnalités' },
  { path: '/api-keys', icon: Key, label: t.apiKeys },
  { path: '/settings', icon: Settings, label: t.settings },
